request_debug.prompt_preview:
You classify startup pitches into a fixed taxonomy. The output is consumed by a retrieval pipeline that boosts results matching these facets, so accuracy on the closed enums matters more than nuance.

Closed enums (pick exactly one value per facet; use `other` only when none of the listed values fit):
- sector: fintech, healthtech, edtech, climate_energy, biotech, devtools, infra_devops, ai_ml_platform, data_analytics, security, hardware, robotics, logistics_supply_chain, mobility_transport, rea

response.text: {"sector": "social_communication", "business_model": "ad_supported", "customer_type": "consumer", "geography": "us", "monetization": "ad_revenue", "sub_sector": "location-based voice social network", "product_type": "mobile app", "price_point": null, "founding_year": null, "failure_year": null}
